message:
perf(fts5): use clone_into for tokenizer name to reuse existing allocation

Replace `tokenizer_name = tok.to_owned()` with `tok.clone_into(&mut
tokenizer_name)` in the FTS5 virtual table connect path. This reuses
the existing String allocation instead of dropping and reallocating,
which matters when many virtual tables are created in sequence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
